title: Update navigation bar and add desktop CTA bar

requirements.text: Add white 'Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang' title text to the Navigation Bar component in mobile view with appropriate font sizing

quotes: Tambahkan text judul web pada Navigation Bar dengan nama 'Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang' dengan warna putih di mobile view, ukuran disesuaikan

acceptanceCriteria: Title text 'Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang' is visible in the mobile view of the Navigation Bar
Font size is appropriately scaled for mobile screens
Title is positioned correctly within the Navigation Bar layout

requirements.text: Remove the 'Simulasi Kredit' menu item from the Navigation Bar component

quotes: Hilangkan menu Simulasi Kredit pada Navigation Bar

acceptanceCriteria: 'Simulasi Kredit' menu item is no longer visible in the Navigation Bar
Other navigation menu items remain functional
Navigation layout adjusts properly after removal

requirements.text: Add Bottom CTA Bar component to desktop view that is currently only visible on mobile

quotes: Tambahkan Bottom CTA Bar pada desktop view

acceptanceCriteria: Bottom CTA Bar is visible in desktop view
Bottom CTA Bar continues to function in mobile view
CTA Bar is positioned at the bottom of the viewport in desktop view
All interactive elements (call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, menu) remain functional

constraints: Do not modify the existing BottomCTABar component functionality
Keep the Navigation Bar component structure intact for desktop view
nonGoals: Changing the styling or colors of existing Navigation Bar elements beyond adding the title text
Modifying the BottomCTABar component's internal functionality or button arrangements
Adding new menu items to the Navigation Bar
